experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Architected and delivered a backend system for the bank's insurance service, addressing 25 critical bugs and driving a 15% increase in customer satisfaction.

Built and maintained a suite of 12 RESTful APIs using ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework, supporting over 1.5 million weekly interactions between frontend and backend systems and sustaining an exceptional API uptime rate.
Implemented token-based authentication and authorization using Entra ID and JWT, strengthening security mechanisms and reducing overall system vulnerabilities by 35%.
Established Azure DevOps pipelines to unify frontend and backend code integration, automating deployment workflows and boosting deployment efficiency by 30%.
Authored unit tests with xUnit and Moq, maintaining 85% code coverage across the codebase.
Refactored SQL Server queries and indexing strategies, yielding a 40% improvement in API response times and lowering server load during peak hours.

experience.title: Software Developer (Contract)
bullets: Integrated a fund management platform with a widely-used accounting SaaS, extending Django data models and building out GraphQL and REST APIs to streamline financial synchronization across 300+ businesses.
Designed and shipped a bulk transaction ingestion feature (Python, Django, SQL, React) capable of handling up to 5,000 concurrent transactions in a single batch.
Provisioned services on a managed Kubernetes cluster to absorb an 80% surge in concurrent traffic; implemented cloud functions to push live cluster-level alerts.

projects.name: ShelfScan
bullets: Delivered a full-stack retail price comparison mobile application in JavaScript and React Native, backed by Firebase and spanning 15+ distinct screens.

Modelled flexible NoSQL data structures and implemented CRUD operations across 4 collections, enabling barcode-driven product lookup, proximity-based price comparison, and personalised shopping lists.

Integrated authentication, granular security rules, and cloud file storage; coordinated collaborative development through Git with feature branches and structured pull request reviews following agile conventions.

projects.name: AquaTrail Explorer App
bullets: Built an Android app for a regional aquarium, implemented an auto-complete search bar, personalized exhibit checklist, and A*-based route planner, powered by a lightweight SQLite store.
Designed the app following MVVM architecture, enforcing scalable design patterns such as dependency injection etc.
Boosted reliability with 95 JUnit cases, end-to-end Espresso UI suites; organized bi-weekly Scrum sprints.

education.credential: B.Sc. Computer Science with High Distinction

scenarios.context: At Terra Investments, the insurance service backend had accumulated 25 critical bugs, degrading reliability and customer satisfaction.
scenarios.action: Architected and delivered a backend system resolving 25 critical bugs using ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework.
scenarios.result: Drove a 15% increase in customer satisfaction and improved overall system reliability.
scenarios.relevance: Demonstrates ability to own and stabilize backend systems in a financial domain.
scenarios.tech: ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, SQL Server

scenarios.context: At Terra Investments, the platform lacked secure and scalable authentication across services.
scenarios.action: Implemented token-based authentication and authorization using Entra ID and JWT across 12 RESTful APIs.
scenarios.result: Reduced system vulnerabilities by 35% and sustained over 1.5 million weekly API interactions with exceptional uptime.
scenarios.relevance: Shows hands-on experience securing and scaling backend APIs in a production financial environment.
scenarios.tech: ASP.NET Core, Entra ID, JWT, REST APIs

scenarios.context: Vantage's platform had no integration with accounting software, requiring manual financial reconciliation across 300+ businesses.
scenarios.action: Extended Django data models and built GraphQL and REST APIs to unify the platform with a leading accounting SaaS.
scenarios.result: Streamlined financial synchronization across 300+ businesses, eliminating manual reconciliation steps.
scenarios.relevance: Highlights experience designing APIs for third-party integrations at scale.
